subcodes.first_line: Lauded be Thy name, O Lord my God! How great is Thy might and Thy sovereignty; how vast Thy strength and Thy dominion!
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی ما اعظم قدرتک و سلطانک و ما اکبر قوتک و اقتدارک اظهرت من ینطق
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
